senses.definition: variant spelling of royal tals or related to royalty; not a standard modern English word
examples: No common usage found for royetous in contemporary English.

senses.definition: variant of royetously, not a standard modern English adverb; does not have established usage
examples: The term royetously is not commonly found in contemporary dictionaries.
